reviews.comment:
Co gélida en el tiempo la estación de servicio de Gessell es un lugar para cargar combustible desde la primera vez que  fui allí en 1968.
Ah y ojo con equivocarte de baño,  hay una señora que limpia que te pone en camino sin vueltas. Bien por esta empleada!!

(Translated by Google)
Frozen in time, the Gesell gas station has been a go-to place to fill up since my first visit in 1968. Oh, and be careful not to go into the wrong bathroom; there's a cleaning lady who'll point you in the right direction. Good for her!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUN3MEtEQ0hBEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
